title: Solar Product Platform Unification
summary: Turn Solar/solar-harness into a productized, extensible, skill-aware, self-evolving platform with snapshot, installer, container validation, secret safety, unified storage/access, extension framework, control plane, and evolution engine.
acceptance: pre-change snapshot and restore dry-run pass
container clean install and smoke tests pass
secret scan passes before any git/release action
Mirage/QMD/MinerU/Obsidian storage roles are separated and validated
evolution engine produces scorecards and promotion gates
control plane unifies state DB, queue, pane lease, and autopilot
